method: Existing bounded GET-only public customer-journey monitor. No form submission, authentication, administrative action, cookie/consent decision, or data write occurred.
limitations: This proves public availability and bounded response content only.
It does not prove mobile accessibility, keyboard, screen-reader, touch, constrained-network, form error/retry, subscription, payment, authenticated Access, or customer-owner journeys.
It does not close the customer_journeys release gate by itself.
